message:
chore: Remove nested crate target directories from tracking

Remove crates/fastmcp-console/target/ build artifacts from version
control. Nested workspace crate build outputs should never have been
committed. The updated .gitignore with **/target/ pattern now prevents
re-adding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
